emails.subject: Re: SWAP FORMS
emails.body: Mary, All those traps with security were worked out 4 years ago. London can get into the o: drive from there, the only directory they have access to in the o: drive is the atty.fms bank. If we put the swap forms back there, they can get at them. I know, because I've pulled them up myself from London. Mary Cook 03/13/01 09:39 AM
